calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-204 precision recalibration consumer (F1 cross-cycle reference; supersedes 541)
items.note: Sleep-substrate plan Phase 1 (REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-1) re-run under the F1 substrate fix landed 2026-05-09. SerotoninModule now maintains a cross-cycle persistent zero-point reference (precision_zero_point_ema_alpha=0.1, EMA across REM captures), and compute_recalibration_target() returns that persistent value rather than the just-captured precision_at_rem_entry. Breaks the within-cycle no-op pattern V3-EXQ-541 surfaced (target == rv at writeback by construction; mean_abs_delta 9e-8, six orders of magnitude under threshold). Identical 2-arm ablation to 541: ARM_0 OFF / ARM_1 ON step=0.1, hazard-heavy / resource-thin env, sleep_loop K=2, 4 cycles per run. Pre-registered acceptance C1/C2/C3 unchanged. Contracts: tests/contracts/test_mech204_precision_recalibration.py 13/13 PASS (4 new F1 tests C10-C13 cover EMA arithmetic, persistent-survives-reset / clears-on-hard-reset, alpha edge cases, state roundtrip). Full preflight + contracts 241/241 PASS. The V3-EXQ-541 manifest will be flipped evidence_direction=superseded with a note recording the F1 substrate fix as the architectural successor.
